title: aster neolanuginosus
intro: Aster neolanuginosus, also known as the white heath aster, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Aster neolanuginosus include its antiseptic and antiviral properties, which can help to boost the immune system and combat infections. Aster neolanuginosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
